summary: Gate/test coverage now covers the prior final-E2E stale-pass/current-fail failure mode and exposes current-head evidence and unresolved gate state in PR artifacts.

inspection.summary: Verified HEAD/worktree, read the gate_coverage request, inspected the added regression test, final-E2E selection implementation, concise PR body contract, current PR prepare/body/evidence artifacts, prior stale gate_coverage result, and ran the focused regression.

judgment_delta: Initial concern: prior gate_coverage result reported final E2E selection could choose stale or failed evidence without current binding/pass ordering. Final conclusion: resolved because src/pr-manager.js ranks binding before status and the added regression creates a stale passing E2E record followed by a current failing E2E record, then asserts the PR body shows the current failure and excludes the stale pass.

Initial concern: CPB-INV-003 could be satisfied only by a happy path current pass. Final conclusion: covered because the new regression specifically asserts failed current evidence remains visible over stale passing evidence, while the existing current-pass regression still covers pass preference when current pass exists.

Initial concern: PR prepare/gate surface might hide freshness or unresolved-state problems. Final conclusion: acceptable because pr-body shows the selected final E2E artifact, verification evidence records current HEAD a266bbee commands, and pr-prepare gate_status still exposes unresolved blockers rather than silently passing them.
